messages.content: You are a senior musicologist, arranger, and orchestrator. Write precise, well-structured prose grounded ONLY in the provided musical facts. Prefer concise paragraphs and clear bullet lists where helpful. Avoid speculation; if something is unknown, say so.

MUSICAL CONTEXT (auto-generated):

Musical analysis context for 'Dancing Queen'.

================================================================================
MUSICAL ANALYSIS DATA
================================================================================

PIECE OVERVIEW:
• Time Signature: 4/4
• Tempo: 105 BPM
• Structure: 12 sections, 96 total bars
• Ensemble: 11 instrument tracks
• Harmony: 89 harmonic sections
• Expression: 5 active controller types

STRUCTURE:
   1. Piece has 12 sections spanning 96 bars
   2. All sections are 8 bars long
   3. Piece appears to have a multi-section form structure
   4. Instruments enter over 20 bars
   5. Piece has 89 harmonic sections
   6. Average harmonic rhythm: 1.1 bars per chord
   7. Piece is substantial in length (over 64 bars)

INSTRUMENTATION:
   1. Piece uses 11 instrument tracks
   2. Uses 5 unique MIDI programs
   3. Has 7 piano instrument(s)
   4. Has 1 strings instrument(s)
   5. Has 2 synth instrument(s)

HARMONY:
   1. Total pitch range spans 72 semitones
   2. Uses 12 unique pitch classes
   3. Common chord types: diminished triad, major triad, minor triad
   4. Piece uses harmonically complex chord structures

PERFORMANCE:
   1. Uses 5 different controller types
   2. Modulation wheel controller active with 16 messages
   3. Volume controller active with 208 messages
   4. Pan controller active with 27 messages
   5. Expression controller active with 16 messages
   6. Sustain pedal controller active with 2 messages

COMPOSITIONAL:
   1. Piece is in 4/4 time signature
   2. Tempo is approximately 105 BPM
   3. Piece has a large ensemble


================================================================================
MUSICAL CONTEXT FOR COMPOSITION
================================================================================

Based on the analysis above, here are key considerations for any composition task:

**Structure & Form**: Consistent 8-bar sections throughout 96 bars
**Harmonic Language**: Uses 12 unique pitch classes with harmonic rhythm of 1.1 bars per chord change
**Instrumentation**: 11 tracks using 5 unique MIDI programs: 7 piano, 1 strings, 2 synth
**Rhythmic Character**: 4/4 time at 105 BPM (moderate, flowing character)
**Performance Style**: Active expression controls: modulation wheel (16 messages), volume control (208 messages), panning (27 messages), expression (16 messages), sustain pedal (2 messages)


Using the analysis context below, produce a robust text description of the piece's ensemble and composition.

OUTPUT REQUIREMENTS (all sections required, omit only if truly unknown):
1) Ensemble Overview (size, instrument families, notable timbres)
2) Instrumentation and Ranges (register spans, total pitch range)
3) Roles and Functions (melody carriers, accompaniment, bass/support)
4) Texture and Layering (how forces combine or alternate over form)
5) Form and Section Flow (high-level structure, section lengths)
6) Harmonic Language (common chord types, harmonic rhythm, pitch-class traits)
7) Rhythmic Character (meter, tempo character, notable grooves)
8) Expression and Controllers (dynamics/CC usage and performance implications)

Write for musicians. Be specific and factual; cite concrete bars/sections when implied by the data.

note: Set OPENAI_API_KEY to actually call the API. This is a dry-run preview.
